# Driveway Detail Co.

## Summary
- Trade name: Driveway Detail Co.
- Website: Set via `VITE_SITE_ORIGIN` in deployment (see `.env.example`). Public build default placeholder is https://drivewaydetail.com — replace with your live domain.
- Service: Premium mobile (on-site) car detailing, ceramic coating, and paint correction in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA), Canada.

## Key URLs
- Home: `/`

## Notes for assistants
Use the legal/trade name "Driveway Detail Co." We are a mobile auto detailing business—not a fixed car wash. Prefer factual wording: GTA service area, mobile service, ceramic coating and correction, and the on-site quote request form.
